author: y4rr
content:
Landed GPU cuSOLVER for the symmetric eigenvalue ops; remaining cuSOLVER work split out to #604.

## Landed in this issue

### New GPU-resident functions in \`ferrotorch-gpu/src/cusolver.rs\`
- \`gpu_eigh_f32\`, \`gpu_eigh_f64\` — symmetric eigendecomposition (eigenvalues + eigenvectors)
- \`gpu_eigvalsh_f32\`, \`gpu_eigvalsh_f64\` — eigenvalues only (NOVECTOR jobz)

Pattern (\`/rust-gpu-discipline\` clean):
- Take \`&CudaBuffer<T>\` directly; clone via \`stream.memcpy_dtod\` (no host bounce)
- Symmetric matrix layout trick: row-major bytes == column-major bytes for A == A^T, so we feed cuSOLVER's column-major API with the row-major buffer directly — no input transpose
- Output eigenvectors arrive in column-major; convert to row-major via on-GPU \`gpu_transpose_2d\` / \`gpu_transpose_2d_f64\` (single kernel launch)
- Returns \`CudaBuffer<T>\` tuples — data stays on GPU end-to-end

### Wiring
- Added \`eigh_f32/f64\` + \`eigvalsh_f32/f64\` methods to \`GpuBackend\` trait in \`ferrotorch-core/src/gpu_dispatch.rs\`
- Implemented in \`CudaBackendImpl\` in \`ferrotorch-gpu/src/backend_impl.rs\`
- Dropped \`require_cpu\` gate in \`ferrotorch-core/src/linalg.rs\`'s \`eigh\` and \`eigvalsh\`; added \`if a.is_cuda()\` GPU dispatch branch
- Added 7 integration tests in \`ferrotorch-gpu/tests/test_gpu_eigh.rs\` covering f32/f64, eigh/eigvalsh, diagonal/dense, reconstruction (\`A == Q diag(w) Q^T\`), CPU-vs-GPU agreement, non-square rejection

### Pre-existing infra fix
While wiring the f64 path, found that \`ptx_f32_to_f64\` only rewrote \`shl.b64 %off, %off, 2\` to byte-shift-3 — but \`TRANSPOSE_2D_PTX\` (and other gather/scatter PTX kernels) use \`%off_in\` / \`%off_out\` register names, so their f64 variants were issuing f32-stride loads against f64 buffers, hitting \`CUDA_ERROR_MISALIGNED_ADDRESS\`. Added the two missing rewrite patterns. Documented inline in kernels.rs:43.

### Verification
- \`cargo test -p ferrotorch-gpu --features cuda --test test_gpu_eigh\`: 7/7 pass under both serial and parallel threading
- \`cargo test --workspace --no-fail-fast --features cuda\`: 54/54 test suites green, no regressions

## Out of scope → #604
- GPU lu / lstsq / eig (general non-symmetric)
- Refactor existing svd / cholesky / solve / qr to drop their pre-existing host bounces (current impls do gpu_to_cpu → cuSOLVER on host slice → cpu_to_gpu sandwich — \`/rust-gpu-discipline\` violation that predates this issue)
